heading: Learn with a Course
body:
To learn more about MongoDB Search, you can take Unit 1 of the
[Atlas Search Course on MongoDB University](https://learn.mongodb.com/learning-paths/atlas-search). The 2.25 hour unit includes an
overview of MongoDB Search and lessons on how to create MongoDB Search indexes, use
[$search](pipe.$search) with different operators, and generate search
[faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref).
